notes: The Creep drive setting is now saved to corresponding driver profiles
Improvements to the automatic resume of stop & go when using Pilot Assist or Adaptive Cruise Control
Improvements to the Park Assist, including an audible warning starting at 100 cm distance to objects
Previously, the audible sensor warning was started at 130 cm
Improvements to Road Sign Information, including a bug fix to prevent reading signs on nearby railways
This software update provides general improvements and compatibility updates.
Audible confirmation when locking the vehicle is introduced
Bug fix for when the steering wheel heating didn't start in colder climates
